hero.alt: A beautiful portrait of a Cassowary in the wild
hero.caption: The Cassowary is a highly adapted species with unique behaviors.

habitat.alt: A Cassowary navigating its natural environment
habitat.caption: They make their home in diverse habitats where they can find shelter and thrive.

diet.alt: A Cassowary finding or consuming food
diet.caption: Finding food is a major part of the daily routine for a Cassowary.

baby.alt: A young or baby Cassowary showing early development
baby.caption: Baby Cassowarys must learn to survive and adapt from a young age.

family.alt: A group of Cassowarys interacting with each other
family.caption: While often solitary, some Cassowarys interact with others of their species.

range.alt: A Cassowary traveling across its geographic range
range.caption: Their geographic range covers various regions suited to their survival.

size.alt: A photo showing the size of a Cassowary
size.caption: The size of a Cassowary can vary depending on its age and environment.

closeup.alt: A detailed close-up showing the physical features of a Cassowary
closeup.caption: A close-up view reveals the intricate details of a Cassowary's body.

fun-fact.alt: A Cassowary showing a unique behavior or adaptation
fun-fact.caption: Did you know that the Cassowary has amazing features that help it survive?
